visual_summary: A demo showcasing a direction-aware tabs component. It displays four tabs with different gradients. A developer would use this component when they need to implement a component that automatically adjusts its direction based on the viewport or other factors, such as RTL languages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: direction-aware-tabs-demo
Description: A demo showcasing a direction-aware tabs component. It displays four tabs with different gradients. A developer would use this component when they need to implement a component that automatically adjusts its direction based on the viewport or other factors, such as RTL languages.
Style: minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: direction-aware, tabs, demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
